faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Corona, Queens?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Corona typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. Multi-room apartments and severe infestations require more extensive treatment. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Corona?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications for Corona residents. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to levels that kill bed bugs at all life stages, while our EPA-approved chemical treatments provide lasting protection. Our technicians will recommend the best approach based on your specific situation and building type.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Corona apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Corona apartments take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or 2-3 hours for chemical application. Heat treatments often require just one visit, while chemical treatments may need a follow-up application 10-14 days later. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Corona home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-10 hours while we raise temperatures to 120-140°F. For chemical treatments, we recommend staying out for 4-6 hours until surfaces dry. Pets should be removed during all treatments. We provide detailed preparation instructions to ensure maximum effectiveness and your family's safety.
